name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】Bulk Stock🔥 Model 575163GG
🔥 The new V-shaped quilting design of the Marmont series is now available. The front features classic double G hardware, while the back has a heart-shaped motif in antique gold. Chain shoulder strap and drawstring closure create versatile looks, also works as a crossbody. Dimensions: 19/17cm
